info.name: E-commerce Microservices API
info.description: API Collection cho hệ thống E-commerce Microservices - Luận văn tốt nghiệp

body.raw:
{
  "fullName": "Nguyễn Văn A",
  "phone": "0123456789",
  "street": "123 Lê Lợi",
  "ward": "Phường Bến Nghé",
  "district": "Quận 1",
  "city": "TP.HCM",
  "isDefault": true
}

{
  "sku": "IPH15PRO-256",
  "name": "iPhone 15 Pro 256GB",
  "slug": "iphone-15-pro-256gb",
  "priceInt": 2999000,
  "stock": 50,
  "description": "iPhone 15 Pro với chip A17 Pro",
  "imageUrls": ["https://example.com/image1.jpg"],
  "categoryId": null,
  "attributes": {
    "color": "Titan xanh",
    "storage": "256GB"
  },
  "model3dUrl": "https://example.com/model.glb"
}

request.description: Add item to cart. userId is automatically extracted from JWT token.
Update cart item quantity. Set quantity to 0 to remove item. userId is automatically extracted from JWT token.
Remove item from cart. userId is automatically extracted from JWT token.
Clear all items from cart. Used after successful checkout.
List orders for current user. userId is automatically extracted from JWT token.

Process payment for an order.

**Payment Methods:**
- `COD`: Cash on Delivery - Payment stays UNPAID until confirmed by admin/shipper
- `SEPAY`: Bank transfer via SePay gateway

**COD Example:**
```json
{
  "orderId": "order-123",
  "method": "COD",
  "amountInt": 500000
}
```

**SePay Example (current):**
```json
{
  "orderId": "order-123",
  "method": "SEPAY",
  "amountInt": 3998000
}
```

variable.description: Order ID to confirm COD payment

request.description:
Confirm COD payment after delivery. Admin/Shipper only.

Use this endpoint when:
- Order has been delivered
- Cash has been collected from customer
- Payment status needs to be updated to PAID

Validations:
- Payment must exist
- Payment method must be COD
- Payment status must be UNPAID
